Name: Classic Context Menu
Description: Revert to Windows 10 classic right-click context menu (no 'Show more options' click).

Name: Disable Bing in Start Menu
Description: Stops local search queries from displaying web results or sending keys to Bing.

Name: Decrease Menu Show Delay
Description: Speeds up response time of cascading submenus and UI hover elements.

Name: Disable NTFS Last Access
Description: Stops NTFS metadata from updating the last read/access timestamp on files.

Name: Enable HAGS
Description: Enables Hardware-Accelerated GPU Scheduling for gaming latency reduction.

Name: Ultimate Power Plan
Description: Unlocks and activates the hidden Ultimate Performance power plan.

Name: Disable VBS / Memory Integrity
Description: Disables Virtualization-Based Security (VBS/HVCI) to free up CPU cycles for gaming.

Name: Disable Game DVR
Description: Disables Windows background recording of gameplay to eliminate micro-stutters.

Name: Disable Startup Delay
Description: Disables the default 10-second Windows startup delay for desktop apps.

Name: Disable Telemetry Services
Description: Disables the DiagTrack service responsible for reporting hardware usage telemetry.

Name: Disable Hibernation
Description: Deletes hiberfil.sys and disables hibernation to reclaim gigabytes of disk space.

Name: Optimize Gaming Scheduling
Description: Prioritizes CPU execution slices for the active foreground window/game.

Name: Enable Large System Cache
Description: Optimizes kernel memory for heavy file disk transfers (not ideal for database servers).

Name: Disable Search Indexer
Description: Stops the constant indexing read/writes (recommended for high-speed SSDs).

Name: Hide Taskbar Widgets/Chat
Description: Removes background WebView2 widget rendering from the system startup.

Name: Disable Tips, Ads, Suggestions
Description: Stops Windows suggestions and background sponsored app downloads.

Name: Storage Sense Auto Cleanup
Description: Cleans up temporary installation files and local folder caches automatically.

Name: Disable HPET Timer
Description: Disables High Precision Event Timer to resolve stutter/latency in games.

Name: Optimize Network Latency
Description: Disables Nagle's algorithm (TCP delay) on the active network interface card.

Name: Enable GPU MSI Mode
Description: Forces GPU to use Message Signaled Interrupts (MSI) mode to prevent screen stutters.
